name: Presence
description: As a Hyperion SMG, the Presence uses reverse recoil: it starts off unsteady, then tightens its aim the longer you hold the trigger. The on-card accuracy reflects its best-case accuracy after sustained fire. Overall it is a solid, no-frills SMG. A Dahl barrel improves initial accuracy and speeds up the accuracy ramp, but slightly increases its final spread.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, Presence variants often appear with the newer Hyperion materials and prefix set used in Borderlands 2. A related variant, the Confidence, is produced by the older Hyperion line. Presence only appears at green rarity or higher. It is a world drop from any appropriate loot source.
